title: support detached figure captions in catalog build
evidence: smoke H6/H7: parsed/_catalog_audit.md shows 176 empty figure/table captions and unresolved refs because many captions like 'FIGURE 1.1' or caption text are separate text blocks adjacent to image blocks rather than MinerU image_caption fields; current yaml only supports figure_caption_merge on existing captions, not adjacent text caption attachment
proposal: extend parser/build_catalogs to associate adjacent caption-like text blocks with preceding image/table blocks, including multi-block captions and panel markers like '(a)' followed by 'FIGURE 1.1'
